headline: A clean start after every update
summary: New installations and newly updated builds now open on Home so What's New stays clear and easy to read.

features.title: Home after updating
features.description: The first launch of each new version or build opens Aster's Home page instead of selecting Canvas.

features.title: An unobstructed What's New
features.description: Canvas no longer focuses its search field behind the update introduction, preventing its outline from covering the panel.

features.title: Normal navigation afterward
features.description: Later launches of the same build continue using Aster's existing enabled-module navigation behavior.
